body.class: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen p-5

input.class: w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 p-4 rounded-xl outline-none focus:border-pink-500 transition-all text-sm
input.placeholder: Tempel link video TikTok di sini...

button.class: w-full tiktok-btn p-4 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

div.class: mt-10 hidden border border-gray-800 p-5 rounded-2xl bg-gray-900/50

a.class: block w-full bg-white text-black p-3 rounded-lg font-bold hover:bg-gray-200 transition
